Title: Relates to contributions made to certain municipally chartered organizations
Summary: Requires covered entities to publicly disclose contributions in the amount of, or having a fair market value of, $2,000 or more in a single transaction or $5,000 in aggregate from the same contributor in any calendar year; requires an annual financial report to be filed with the county clerk; makes related provisions.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law, in relation to contributions made to certain municipally chartered organizations
